summary: Iteration 202: Tested retry-captured feature for documents stuck in 'Captured' workflow_status. All 8 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed. POST /api/readiness/retry-captured returns 200 with correct response structure (total_found, retried, escalated_to_exception, max_retries=4, details, message). Frontend 'Retry Stuck' button visible in inbox toolbar, clicking it calls API and shows toast notification. Backend scheduler log confirms 'Captured Doc Auto-Retry scheduler started (interval: 300s, max retries: 4)'. Regression tests for inbox-metrics and inbox-stats passed.
critical_code_review_comments: readiness.py lines 911-1008: POST /api/readiness/retry-captured correctly implements retry logic with MAX_RETRIES=4, reprocesses docs with reclassify=True, escalates to exception_review after max retries
server.py lines 7629-7757: _captured_retry_scheduler() runs every 5 minutes (300s), detects docs stuck >5 min in captured status, max 4 retries before escalation
UnifiedQueuePage.js lines 337-350: handleRetryCaptured() calls POST /api/readiness/retry-captured and shows appropriate toast (info for 0 found, success for retried/escalated)
UnifiedQueuePage.js line 395-397: Retry Stuck button with data-testid='retry-captured-btn' correctly placed in toolbar
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - preview environment has 0 docs stuck in captured status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 202 verified retry-captured feature. Key findings: (1) POST /api/readiness/retry-captured returns {total_found, retried, escalated_to_exception, max_retries, details, message}. (2) max_retries is 4 as per requirements. (3) force_escalate=true parameter works. (4) Backend scheduler 'Captured Doc Auto-Retry scheduler started (interval: 300s, max retries: 4)' confirmed in logs. (5) Frontend 'Retry Stuck' button visible in inbox toolbar with data-testid='retry-captured-btn'. (6) Clicking button shows toast 'No stuck captured docs found.' when no docs are stuck. (7) Regression: inbox-metrics and inbox-stats endpoints still work.
